name: WGT2022_2023
label: Final weight for the 2022-2023 NSFG
notes: The range of weight values is shown here with 2 decimal places, but individual weight values in the data file have more decimal place

name: VEST
label: Randomized version of the Variance Estimation Stratum

name: VECL
label: Randomized version of the Variance Estimation Cluster

name: CMINTVW
label: Century month for date of interview (computed in FC A-1)

name: CMLSTYR
label: Century month for 1 year prior to interview (computed in FC A-1)

name: CMJAN3YR
label: Century month of January (Current Year - 3) (computed in FC A-1)

name: CMJAN4YR
label: Century Month of January Four Years Prior to Year of Interview (computed in FC A-1)

name: CMJAN5YR
label: Century month of January (Current Year - 5) (computed in FC A-1)

name: CMFIVYR
label: Century month of interview - 5 yrs (computed in FC A-1)

name: PHASE1
label: Whether case was selected for Phase 1 sample

name: PHASE2
label: Whether case was selected for Phase 2 sample

name: PHASE3
label: Whether case was selected for Phase 3 sample
